# 📊 Student Performance Analysis using Python

## 📌 Project Overview

This project analyzes student academic performance using Python and Pandas. The objective is to identify the key factors that influence students' scores in Mathematics, Reading, and Writing through data cleaning, exploratory data analysis (EDA), visualization, and business insights.

---

## 🎯 Objectives

- Analyze student performance across different subjects.
- Identify factors affecting academic performance.
- Compare performance based on gender, lunch type, parental education, race/ethnicity, and test preparation.
- Discover meaningful insights using data visualization.
- Provide actionable recommendations for improving student performance.

---

## 🛠️ Technologies Used

- Python
- Pandas
- NumPy
- Matplotlib
- Seaborn
- Jupyter Notebook

---

## 📂 Dataset Information

The dataset contains information about students including:

- Gender
- Race/Ethnicity
- Parental Level of Education
- Lunch Type
- Test Preparation Course
- Math Score
- Reading Score
- Writing Score

---

## 📋 Project Workflow

### 1. Business Understanding

- Defined project objectives
- Identified business problems

### 2. Data Understanding

- Dataset exploration
- Data types
- Missing values
- Duplicate records

### 3. Data Cleaning

- Checked null values
- Checked duplicates
- Renamed columns
- Created Overall Average Score

### 4. KPI Analysis

- Total Students
- Average Score
- Highest Score
- Lowest Score
- Pass Percentage
- Top Performing Students

### 5. Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)

Performed more than **60 analytical questions**, including:

- Gender-wise analysis
- Lunch type analysis
- Test preparation analysis
- Parent education analysis
- Race/Ethnicity analysis
- Correlation analysis
- Performance comparison
- Score distribution
- Top & Bottom performers

### 6. Data Visualization

Created 10 professional charts including:

- Histograms
- Bar Charts
- Scatter Plot
- Correlation Heatmap
- Boxplots

### 7. Business Insights

Generated 10 business insights based on the analysis.

### 8. Recommendations

Provided 5 practical recommendations to improve student academic performance.

---

# 📈 Key Findings

- Students who completed the test preparation course performed better overall.
- Students with standard lunch achieved higher average scores.
- Reading and Writing scores showed the strongest positive correlation.
- Parental education has a noticeable impact on student performance.
- Most students scored within the average performance range.

---

# 💡 Recommendations

- Encourage students to complete the test preparation course.
- Provide additional support for students receiving free/reduced lunch.
- Conduct remedial programs for low-performing students.
- Increase parental involvement in student learning.
- Strengthen reading and writing development programs.

---
